news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Data Center Automation Software and Services Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. Covering the periods 2019-2024 (historic) and 2024-2029, 2034F (forecast), the report offers insights into this market segment. It assesses the global market, including regional breakdowns and analysis of major economies in each region. Key findings and opportunities in the market are provided, offering strategies up to 2034. For more details, refer to the comprehensive report on this sector.
news.headline: Global data center automation software and services market is valued at $89.31 billion. Microsoft, Cisco Systems, Dell, IBM, and Amazon hold dominant market positions.

news.summary: EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) based in Norwalk, Conn., has disclosed a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share. The said dividend is slated for payment on July 31, 2025, and will be distributed to stockholders listed as of July 15, 2025. EMCOR Group, Inc., a Fortune 500 company, specializes in mechanical and electrical construction services, industrial and energy infrastructure, and building services. News regarding this announcement and more can be accessed on the company’s website.
news.headline: EMCOR Group, Inc. declares $0.25 quarterly dividend per share, payable on July 31, 2025 to shareholders of record on July 15, 2025.

news.summary: Adsposure has recently been appointed as the exclusive advertising services provider for MetroLink Tulsa, encompassing buses and static assets. The collaboration, effective as of July 3, 2025, marks a significant milestone for Adsposure, a prominent transit advertising company. Through this partnership, Adsposure will manage advertising campaigns on MetroLink Tulsa's vehicles and stationary assets.
news.headline: Adsposure partners with MetroLink Tulsa for bus and static advertising services. Official as of July 3, 2025.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, educational platform Noodle Partners, PBC made public its acquisition of significant assets belonging to MindMax, LLC, a top marketing and enrollment firm collaborating with higher education institutions. This move enhances Noodle's capacity to offer adaptable, comprehensive services to its clients, building on its existing strengths in the sector.
news.headline: Noodle Partners acquires MindMax to enhance marketing and enrollment for universities, expanding capabilities.

news.summary: Mira's Harvest, a Caribbean herbal wellness brand known for its popular soursop bitters, has recently expanded its presence in the United States and Puerto Rico. The brand has made its debut in 256 GNC stores nationwide, representing a significant milestone for Mira's Harvest as it enters the national retail market. This move is expected to increase accessibility to the brand's products and reach a wider audience.
news.headline: Caribbean brand Mira's Harvest launches in 256 GNC stores across US and Puerto Rico, going mainstream.

news.summary: Join us in nominating a deserving local educator to receive a grant of $1,000 in valuable classroom supplies. Little Sleepies, a popular brand celebrated for its cozy pajamas and children's clothing, has introduced a new program to support teachers across the country. This initiative aims to show appreciation for educators and provide them with resources to enhance the learning experience for students.
news.headline: Little Sleepies launches initiative to clear teachers' wishlists, giving $1,000 in supplies.LOS ANGELES, July 3, 2025.

news.summary: An acclaimed sculptor, Sergio Furnari, recognized for his bronze sculptures of iconic figures, will reveal a new statue of Cristiano Ronaldo at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey. The unveiling will take place during the FIFA Club World Cup semifinals and final on July 3, 2025. Ronaldo's bronze sculpture is set to be showcased to a global audience, highlighting Furnari's artistic talent.
news.headline: Sculptor Sergio Furnari unveils bronze Cristiano Ronaldo statue during FIFA Club World Cup, MetLife Stadium, 2:22pm.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Denver, Scrum Alliance revealed its inclusion in Comparably's 2025 lineup of Best Leadership Teams for small companies in the US. This esteemed acknowledgment stems solely from evaluations by present employees, highlighting excellence in leadership and management practices.
news.headline: Scrum Alliance ranked #3 on Comparably's 2025 list of Best Leadership Teams among small companies based on employee ratings.

news.summary: In Miami on July 3, 2025, Think Global Media Group unveiled plans for the debut of IMPACT WEALTH, a luxury lifestyle docu-series showcasing the lives of the world's most influential individuals. The show is set to premiere in January 2026 and promises to offer viewers a glimpse into a world of opulence without boundaries. Stay tuned for this high-end production that will open doors to exclusive experiences.
news.headline: "New TV series IMPACT WEALTH showcases the luxury world of influential figures, premiering Jan 2026."

news.summary: Manta Network has joined forces with Wello to incorporate fiat payment options into SUPERFORTUNE, aiming to improve user accessibility to Web3 applications by facilitating smooth fiat transactions. This collaboration will leverage Wello's expertise in providing fiat solutions, combining it with Manta Network's infrastructure to enhance the overall user experience. This partnership brings the potential to significantly impact the adoption of decentralized platforms, with SUPERFORTUNE being at the forefront of this initiative. Stay tuned for more updates on this integration, as it promises to reshape the landscape of Web3 applications.
news.headline: Manta Network and Wello team up to launch SUPERFORTUNE with fiat integration, improving access to Web3 apps. #partnership #blockchain

news.summary: It typically takes several weeks for bone fractures and breaks to heal, with an average healing time ranging from a few weeks to several months depending on the severity of the injury. In an effort to expedite this process, a natural remedy called CALCEED has been developed by SYNEVIT®. This optimized calcium dietary supplement is designed to accelerate the healing of bone fractures and breaks. This innovation comes as a promising solution to the lengthy recovery period associated with such injuries.
news.headline: CALCEED® accelerates bone healing. SYNEVIT®'s supplement shortens long recovery times for fractures.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Reddit, Inc. (NYSE: RDDT) shared that their financial results for the second quarter of 2025 will be disclosed post-market closure on Thursday, July 31, 2025. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET on the same day. To access the live webcast of the call and relevant earnings documents, individuals can visit Reddit's Investor Relations webpage at investor.redditinc.com and the investor relations subreddit r/RDDT. A playback of the conference call will also be available.
news.headline: Reddit will announce Q2 2025 financial results on July 31, 2025, with a conference call at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET. Webcast available on investor.redditinc.com and r/RDDT.

news.summary: Leading global technology and data provider, Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), headquartered in Atlanta and New York, recently disclosed its trading volume and revenue for June 2025. The report highlighted record-breaking trading volume across ICE's markets in the first half of the year. Detailed statistics can be accessed on the company’s investor relations website: https://ir.theice.com/ir-resources/supplemental-information. This data is available in the Monthly Statistics Tracking spreadsheet. Explore the impressive trading figures from ICE to understand the market trends and performance.
news.headline: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) reports June 2025 trading volume & revenue statistics. Record traded volume in 1st half 2025. Link for details: https://ir.theice.com/ir-resources/supplemental-information

news.summary: The robotic surgery market is experiencing rapid growth, expected to reach USD 33.8 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 16.1%. This growth is fueled by technological advancements, healthcare automation, and the global need to reduce clinical errors. Robotic surgery is redefining surgical precision and patient recovery, particularly in soft tissue procedures. These robots offer increased accuracy, faster patient turnaround, and reduced complications. Robotic surgery machines are also solving medication errors and procedural inefficiencies, transforming care delivery. Emerging markets in countries like India, China, Brazil, and South Africa are driving the growth of robotic surgery, with rising surgical volumes and investor-friendly regulations.
news.headline: Robotic surgery market to reach $33.8 billion by 2029, growing at 16.1% CAGR. Surge in demand for precision and patient recovery driving this transformation in healthcare. East and South emerging as investable markets.

news.summary: Veteran of the gaming industry, John Smedley, is venturing into the world of Web3 gaming with a brand-new AAA shooter. This upcoming game will showcase the innovative Tezos layer-2 blockchain technology known as Etherlink. Smedley's entry into this space marks his initial venture in Web3 gaming, hinting at exciting developments in the industry. Stay tuned for more updates on this groundbreaking project.
news.headline: Game industry veteran John Smedley secures $30.5M for debut shooter on Tezos-powered Etherlink blockchain.

news.summary: The Bitcoin price remaining below $112,000 for an extended period is attributed to the lack of new buyers and the presence of FOMO-induced greed. These factors are anticipated to have a significant influence, potentially prolonging the stagnation of Bitcoin values.
news.headline: Bitcoin struggles to surpass $112,000 ATH due to lack of new buyers and FOMO-driven greed, analysts suggest.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on July 3, 2025, a national hotel brokerage and advisory firm known as DSH Hotel Advisors revealed key information. Specializing in hotel investment sales, the firm is based in Tampa and is headed by Dennis S. Hopper, who serves as the Managing Principal and Founder. Additionally, announcements were made regarding Sam Subodh Patel's involvement in the firm.
news.headline: Hotel brokerage DSH Hotel Advisors closes sale of Jacksonville Candlewood Suites in heated market.头9M四2935Dennis S. Hopper is firm's Managing Principal/Founder.

news.summary: A luxury RV park in Caddo Mills, Texas, named Holiday Road RV Park, is inviting travelers and long-term residents to experience their premier community. The park, managed by Lamplight Luxury RV Parks, boasts modern amenities, security features, and comfort for guests. Located in Caddo Mills, TX, the park offers a unique blend of services to ensure a pleasant experience for those staying short or long-term.
news.headline: Lamplight Luxury RV Parks promoting Holiday Road RV Park in Caddo Mills, TX to travelers for an ideal getaway.

news.summary: A new AI-powered software is enhancing ABA practices by improving patient relationships and optimizing workflows with advanced tools. Wilma™, the leading AI practice management software, is revolutionizing the industry in Diablo, California. Launched on July 3, 2025, this software is helping practitioners become more efficient and effective. This advancement comes as the nation marks its independence, with many celebrations lighting up the sky. Wilma™ is playing a pivotal role in transforming how ABA practices operate, making a significant impact in the industry.
news.headline: AI software Wilma™ revolutionizes ABA practices, enhancing patient relationships and workflow efficiency. Supported by PRNewswire on July 3, 2025.

news.summary: Next week, the famous pygmy hippo named Moo Deng will be celebrating her first birthday. Interestingly, a group of cryptocurrency enthusiasts are currently boosting the value of an unofficial meme coin associated with her on the Solana blockchain.
news.headline: Pygmy hippo Moo Deng's birthday plans revealed by zoo as her unofficial Solana meme coin surges due to crypto degens.

news.summary: Unemployment is projected to reach the highest level since October 2021. The latest jobs report indicates strong hiring trends, leading to a decrease in unemployment. S&P 500 futures are on the rise following this positive development in the job market.
news.headline: Job report shows strong hiring, lower unemployment; S&P 500 futures increase. Jobless rate expected highest since October 2021.

news.summary: Torrance, CA - On July 3, 2025, Navitas Semiconductor, a renowned power semiconductor company specializing in gallium nitride (GaN) power ICs and silicon carbide (SiC) technology, disclosed its involvement in several forthcoming investor events.
news.headline: Navitas Semiconductor to attend CJS Securities Conference; industry leader in next-gen power semiconductors.

news.summary: In JILIN, China on July 3, 2025, Zhengye Biotechnology Holding Limited, listed on Nasdaq as ZYBT, is a prominent veterinary vaccine manufacturer engaged in the comprehensive process of researching, developing, producing, and selling veterinary vaccines. The company specializes in livestock vaccines.
news.headline: China-based Zhengye Biotechnology Holding Limited (Nasdaq: ZYBT) disclosed fiscal year 2024 financial results on July 3, 2025.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Hims to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Hims within the period of April 29, 2025, and June 22, 2025, and wish to explore your options, contact James Wilson directly.

news.summary: In Caesarea, Israel, on July 3, 2025, IceCure Medical Ltd. (Nasdaq: ICCM) revealed their development of minimally-invasive cryoablation technology. This innovative method freezes tumors as an alternative to surgical removal. IceCure is at the forefront of this technology, offering a promising solution for patients worldwide.
news.headline: IceCure Medical Ltd. (Nasdaq: ICCM) reports preliminary financial results for the Three and Six Months Ended June 30, 2025.

news.summary: John Smedley has confidence that his latest studio's bold shooter game, Reaper Actual, will captivate the gaming community with its innovative utilization of blockchain technology. He believes it epitomizes the correct implementation of Web3.
news.headline: Creator of EverQuest and Planetside announces open-world shooter 'Reaper Actual', set to revolutionize gaming with blockchain technology.

news.summary: SYNEVIT® introduces an optimized inositol complex formulated with a synergistic combination of ingredients to enhance support for women's natural reproductive system. The product launch was announced in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on July 3, 2025. Polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) is a prevalent reproductive system issue gaining increased awareness annually.
news.headline: PCOS common issue for women in reproductive health. FERTILIMIN® aids with SYNEVIT®'s optimized inositol complex.

news.summary: Judy Goldring, previously the President and Head of Global Distribution at AGF, has been appointed as the new CEO of the company with immediate effect. This announcement signifies a significant change in leadership at AGF, a prominent firm in the financial sector. Goldring's transition to this role reflects a strategic decision by AGF's management to entrust her with greater responsibilities. As the newly appointed CEO, Goldring will oversee the company's operations and lead its global distribution initiatives. This move underscores AGF's commitment to innovating and adapting to the evolving needs of the market under Goldring's direction.
news.headline: AGF CEO Kevin McCreadie passes away, Judy Goldring appointed CEO. Goldring to take over as CEO immediately.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA), a key player in Web 3.0 solutions in China, disclosed the acquisition of 74,315 Binance Coin (BNB) tokens via OTC at an average price of roughly US$672.45, totaling around US$50 million. This purchase brings the Company's total reserve of leading digital currencies, such as Bitcoin and BNB, to about US$160 million. This move signals the initial phase of Nano Labs' strategic plan to boost BNB holdings as part of its commitment to growing its digital assets portfolio.
news.headline: Nano Labs buys $50 million worth of Binance Coin (BNB), expanding digital asset reserves to $160 million. Successful step in BNB strategic plan.
